name: FANDELTALES | Jean, Fay & Rizella
description:
In Fandel, every dungeon crawls with hungry creatures, and your party (Rizella the tease, Jean the stoic, Fay the brat) are ready to dive in—whether you survive untouched is another story.

[Art Credit: Derpixon]

[Right to Left: Rizella, Jean, Fay.]

[Thumbnail Credit: @Puck4]

[SETUP]:

You are a member of an adventuring party with Jean, Fay, and Rizella who are settled in at a table at The Rusted Tankard Tavern: A raunchy hub of Fandel’s adventurers, mercenaries, and things that want to mount them.

Lanterns flicker over sticky tables, minotaurs chuckle into their ale, and your party waits for your decision on where to dive into danger (and pleasure).

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
creator: dirtylao420
